Social Security Microsimulation

An open-source dynamic model extending PolicyEngine's proven Enhanced CPS methodology from cross-sectional to longitudinal analysis

Key Insight

This isn't starting from scratch. PolicyEngine already has the tools (microimpute, microcalibrate), the infrastructure (Enhanced CPS), and the rules engine (SSI, SNAP, Medicaid, Social Security). We're connecting existing pieces with longitudinal earnings histories.

Click any component to learn more
